name: Bond
summary: See the auras of nearby Survivors.

name: Prove Thyself
summary: Improve cooperative repair efficiency when working with nearby Survivors.

name: Leader
summary: Improve certain action speeds for nearby teammates.

name: Quick & Quiet
summary: Hide the loud-noise notification caused by a rushed action.

name: Sprint Burst
summary: Gain a burst of speed when you begin running.

name: Adrenaline
summary: Recover and gain speed when the exit gates become powered.

name: Empathy
summary: See injured or dying Survivors from a distance.

name: Botany Knowledge
summary: Improve healing speed at the cost of reduced item efficiency.

name: Self-Care
summary: Heal yourself without requiring a med-kit.

name: Iron Will
summary: Reduce the volume of grunts of pain while injured.

name: Calm Spirit
summary: Reduce interactions that reveal your location through screams or disturbed wildlife.

name: Saboteur
summary: See nearby hooks and sabotage them without a toolbox.

name: Balanced Landing
summary: Reduce landing penalties and gain speed after falling.

name: Urban Evasion
summary: Move faster while crouching.

name: Streetwise
summary: Reduce item-consumption rates for yourself and nearby teammates.

name: Technician
summary: Reduce generator-repair noise and limit the consequences of failed skill checks.

name: Lithe
summary: Gain a burst of speed after performing a rushed vault.

name: Alert
summary: Reveal the Killer's aura after they perform certain destructive actions.

name: Open-Handed
summary: Increase the effective range of aura-reading abilities.

name: Up the Ante
summary: Increase the Luck of the remaining Survivors while teammates are alive.

name: Ace in the Hole
summary: Improve the add-ons found attached to items from chests.

name: Left Behind
summary: Reveal the Hatch aura when you are the final Survivor remaining.

name: Borrowed Time
summary: Extend protection effects granted to Survivors rescued from a hook.

name: Unbreakable
summary: Recover from the dying state more quickly and stand up once without help.

name: We're Gonna Live Forever
summary: Improve healing when assisting a Survivor in the dying state.

name: Dead Hard
summary: Gain a brief Endurance effect after meeting its activation condition.

name: No Mither
summary: Remain injured throughout the trial while gaining several survival benefits.

name: Sole Survivor
summary: Reduce the Killer's ability to read your aura as teammates are eliminated.

name: Object of Obsession
summary: Periodically reveal your aura and the Killer's aura under certain conditions.

name: Decisive Strike
summary: Attempt a skill check to escape the Killer after recently being unhooked.

name: Pharmacy
summary: Search chests more effectively and gain improved access to medical supplies.

name: Vigil
summary: Help yourself and nearby Survivors recover from negative status effects faster.

name: Wake Up!
summary: Reveal exit gates and improve your gate-opening speed during the endgame.

name: Tenacity
summary: Crawl more quickly while recovering from the dying state.

name: Detective's Hunch
summary: Reveal nearby objectives after a generator is completed.

name: Stake Out
summary: Earn tokens near the Killer that improve successful skill checks.

name: Dance With Me
summary: Hide your scratch marks briefly after a rushed vault or locker exit.

name: Windows of Opportunity
summary: Reveal nearby pallets, windows and breakable walls.

name: Boil Over
summary: Make it more difficult for the Killer to carry you to a hook.

name: Diversion
summary: Throw a pebble to create a misleading noise notification.

name: Deliverance
summary: Unhook yourself after safely rescuing another Survivor.

name: Autodidact
summary: Gain increasingly powerful healing skill checks as the trial progresses.
